security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Casual RAS — share this screen or connect to another, peer-to-peer.
bundle.longDescription: One app for embeddable, white-label remote access. Share this machine's screen (with local Allow/Deny consent) or connect to another and view it — over an encrypted peer-to-peer (Iroh/QUIC) link, no server involved. View-only with a remote pointer in the alpha; sharing is macOS-only for now, connecting works everywhere.
